issues.sample: I was Driving on the highway and my whole instrument cluster failed and went completely black. I couldn’t see my speed, gauges, or anything. Had to have the car towed to the dealer. Then the dealer is trying to claim it’s not under warranty and is charging me $8,000 to fix. This

narrative.headline: What 2023 Lamborghini Huracan owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (100% of reports).
